title: Compliance: lichen-oscore edhoc.rs OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7 and §8.8. File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. EDHOC RFC 9528 Suite 0 implementation for establishing OSCORE contexts. X25519 + Ed25519 + AES-CCM. export_oscore() derives OSCORE_Master_Secret and OSCORE_Master_Salt.
close_reason: Verified RFC 9528 compliant: Suite 0 (X25519+Ed25519+AES-CCM-16-64-128+SHA-256), correct EDHOC-KDF info structure, transcript hashes (TH_2/TH_3/TH_4), PRK derivation chain, both signature verifications, OSCORE export with correct labels. Tests pass. PRK secrets zeroized.
